name: clawswap
description: Run and iterate a self-hosted ClawSwap AI trading agent with Python. Supports runtime trading, local backtests, and market data download.
author: clawswap

commands.name: runtime
commands.description: Start runtime client with strategy loop, heartbeat, telemetry, and reconnect flow

commands.name: backtest
commands.description: Run local backtest over downloaded historical candles

strategy.description: Trading strategy: demo | momentum | mean_reversion | grid | breakout | dual_ma | short_momentum | range_scalper | adaptive | random | none

changelog.0.3.1: Align metadata semantics with SKILL.md, tighten command definitions, and add release packaging workflow.
changelog.0.3.0: Runtime v1 protocol: API key auth, auto-registration, paper trading, heartbeat/telemetry, rotate/revoke recovery
changelog.0.2.0: Self-hosted agent runner, local backtest engine, strategy templates, Binance data downloader
